form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign fifth of 8 at this track January 24 over 366m, 2 len behind Sm My Valentine with 57kg at $11.70. Previously first up; second last in a small field at this track December 14 over 320m, 1.5 len behind Walk When I Walk carrying 57kg at $6.10. Others rate better.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation fourth of 7 at this track August 31 over 101m, 0.6 len behind Heza Good Reason with 57kg at $4.60. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.3 len this track June 15 over 274m defeating Rayenare carrying 57kg at $6.50. Form shown last campaign makes for good reading.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation won by 0.3 len this track December 6 over 274m defeating Apollitical Joy carrying 57kg at $1.70. Previous preparation first-up favourite; won by 0.5 len this track October 18 over 274m defeating Da One On Fire with 57kg at $3. Looks a key runner.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. First-up ran last in a small field at this track on February 22 over 320m, 2.5 len behind Winners Share carrying 57kg at $9.20.
